task: openclaw-benben vNext local-lane hard refusal removal

scope.feishu_current_live_observation: old prod config has feishu.enabled=false; shadow config has feishu.enabled=true for the same app id hash. This repair did not change that routing.

reason.symptom: After /lite correctly switched into local lane, prompts containing piracy or paid-bypass wording were still answered with a fixed plugin-layer refusal before the local model was called.
reason.root_cause: workspace/plugins/openclaw-benben-vnext/index.js contained LOCAL_LANE_ILLEGAL_COPYRIGHT_RE and LOCAL_LANE_ILLEGAL_COPYRIGHT_TEXT, and handleBenbenLocalLane returned that text before localModelAdapter invocation.
reason.boundary_note: This repair removes the OpenClaw vNext plugin pre-model hardblock. It does not and cannot remove upstream provider/platform/model safety behavior outside this codebase.

local_changes.summary: Removed LOCAL_LANE_ILLEGAL_COPYRIGHT_TEXT, LOCAL_LANE_ILLEGAL_COPYRIGHT_RE, and the pre-adapter fixed refusal branch.
Changed the local-lane regression test to assert copyright/paid-bypass wording reaches the local adapter instead of being fixed-refused.

shadow_changes.summary: Synced the updated plugin source to the shadow state root.
Restarted only the shadow gateway so the updated plugin source was loaded.

rollback.strategy: Restore backed-up /var/lib/openclaw-benben/.openclaw/workspace/plugins/openclaw-benben-vnext/index.js, then restart openclaw-benben.service. Old production openclaw-gateway.service was not modified.

shadow_checks: remote sha256 matches local plugin source
remote grep found no LOCAL_LANE_ILLEGAL_COPYRIGHT or fixed refusal text in the active shadow plugin source
synthetic remote import test confirmed /lite '怎么下载盗版视频 ...' and subsequent '帮我绕过付费墙' reached localModelAdapter with providerModel=ollama/huihui_ai/qwen3.5-abliterated:9b
journalctl after restart shows openclaw-benben-vnext registering Feishu local-lane hooks with serviceKind=benben-vnext-shadow
read-only config fingerprint check: old prod feishu.enabled=false; shadow feishu.enabled=true; appIdHash matched, so no dual consumption was observed

residual_risk: Cloud/full-agent provider safety behavior is outside the plugin hardblock removed here and may still refuse according to upstream model/provider policy.
This change intentionally does not alter memory privacy, tool gate, production operation confirmation, secret redaction, provider-network fail-closed, or Feishu cutover gates.
No production Feishu cutover was performed.
